INSTALL-MODE.story_prompt: How do you prefer to install uDOS?
INSTALL-MODE.story_help: Interactive: Questions for each setting, Guided: Recommended defaults, Automated: Use all defaults

FIRST-RUN-ROLE.description: Initial role assignment for first run
FIRST-RUN-ROLE.story_prompt: What role should be assigned for the first user?
FIRST-RUN-ROLE.story_help: This determines initial capabilities and access levels

ADVENTURE-MODE.story_help: Adventure mode adds quest tracking and achievement systems

STARTUP-STORY-AUTO.description: When to automatically run startup stories
STARTUP-STORY-AUTO.story_prompt: When should startup stories automatically run?
STARTUP-STORY-AUTO.story_help: Controls automatic execution of role-specific startup configurations

VARIABLE-PERSISTENCE.story_help: Session-only: Reset each session, Permanent: Save across sessions, Role-based: Depends on role

DEV-MODE-DEFAULT.story_prompt: How should development mode be configured by default?
DEV-MODE-DEFAULT.story_help: Role-based: Available for IMP+ roles, User-choice: Ask each user

TUTORIAL-SYSTEM.story_prompt: What level of tutorial system do you want?
TUTORIAL-SYSTEM.story_help: Adaptive: Adjusts based on user role and experience level

THEME-SYSTEM.story_prompt: How should visual themes be managed?
THEME-SYSTEM.story_help: Role-themed: Different visual styles for each role level
